>> Privacy Policy
Privacy Policy for WicProgram.us
Effective Date:
May 1st, 2025
At
WicProgram.us
(“we,” “our,” or “us”), your privacy is important to us. This Privacy Policy outlines how we collect, use, disclose, and protect your information when you visit
https://wicprogram.us
.
1. Information We Collect
Personal Information:
Information you voluntarily provide, such as your name and message, when you use our contact form.
Usage Data:
IP address, browser type, referring pages, and interactions on our site.
Cookies & Similar Technologies:
Used to personalize content, provide social media features, analyze traffic, and serve ads (see Section 2).
2. Use of Google AdSense
We use Google AdSense to serve advertisements. Google may collect and use data from your visits using cookies or similar technologies.
Google uses cookies to personalize ads and track performance.
You can opt out of personalized ads through
Google Ads Settings
.
Learn more:
Google Partner Sites Policy
3. How We Use Your Information
Respond to inquiries
Analyze traffic and improve website performance
Serve relevant advertisements
Ensure compliance with applicable laws
4. Sharing of Information
We do not sell or rent your personal data. We may share information with:
Service providers who assist with website functionality and analytics
Legal authorities, if required
Advertising partners (such as Google), under applicable terms
5. Your Privacy Rights (GDPR & CCPA)
For EEA residents:
Right to access, correct, or delete your personal data
Right to object to or restrict how we process your data
For California residents (CCPA):
Right to know what personal data we collect and how we use it
Right to request deletion of personal information
Right to opt out of the sale of personal data (we do not sell data)
To exercise these rights, please contact us using the form linked below.
6. Data Retention and Security
We retain data only as long as needed for legitimate business or legal purposes. We implement reasonable safeguards to protect your information.
7. Children’s Privacy
Our site is not intended for children under 13. We do not knowingly collect data from children.
8. Third-Party Links
Our website may contain links to third-party sites. We are not responsible for their privacy practices.
9. Contact Us
For any questions about this Privacy Policy or to exercise your data rights, please contact us through our form:
👉
https://wicprogram.us/contact
WIC Program © 2026. All Rights Reserved |
